title: MVP Reduction
description: Phase 5 input — scoping decision before handoff generation

include.description: What is IN the MVP. Must be sufficient to validate the core hypothesis.

rationale.description: Why this scope is the right minimum.

defer_reason.description: Why this is not in MVP.

trigger_for_inclusion.description: What event or condition would make this worth building.

deferred.description: Capabilities deferred to future phases with explicit triggers.

explicit_exclusions.description: Things permanently out of scope — not deferred, not planned.

scalability_path.description: How the MVP architecture enables the deferred items without a rewrite.
